x-enumeration-literals.name: Recruitment Phase
x-enumeration-literals.description: Identifying and targeting potential partners who complement business objectives.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Onboarding Phase
x-enumeration-literals.description: Introducing partners to the brand, tools, and training, and providing the resources needed to sell.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Activation Phase
x-enumeration-literals.description: Initial engagement where partners begin to sell, often marked by the first deal or co-selling activities.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Growth Phase
x-enumeration-literals.description: Supporting the partner to increase performance, improve skills, and deepen the relationship.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Renewal or Exit Phase
x-enumeration-literals.description: Evaluating the partnership's success to either continue and renew the relationship or amicably terminate it.
